description: 4-Layer Robustness Pyramid for TradeExecGym. Layer 0: Environment boot. Layer 1: Unit tests. Layer 2: Baseline scores. Layer 3: Skill gradient. Layer 4: OpenEnv API compliance.

layer1_unit_tests.stdout_tail:

layer3_skill_gradient.interpretation: Lower IS bps = better execution. Random > TWAP > AC Optimal confirms skill gradient.

performance_profiling.note: Baseline cache runs 3 full simulations (TWAP/VWAP/AC) = 360 physics steps at reset

layer4_openenv_compliance.note: Run with --full to include Layer 4 API compliance (server required).
